data.welcome-to-the-documentation-for-fzstudi: Here you’ll find everything you need to know about the scripts created by FzStudio. This documentation is designed to guide you through the installation process and help you troubleshoot any issues you may come across.
data.need-help#Need Help?: If you’re having trouble and the documentation doesn’t solve your issue, don’t worry! We offer support and can answer any questions you have in the FzStudio Discord. You can find it below!

Here you can find the documentation for the assets created by FzStudio!

data.installation#Installation:
Download the resource and place it in your resources directory.
Add ensure fz-moneywash to your server.cfg file.
Configure the resource to your liking.
Done, Its that easy!
data.support#Support: For any issues or suggestions join: Discord ↗

data.installation#Installation:
Download the resource and place it in your resources directory.
Add ensure fz-rental to your server.cfg file.
Add the item into ox_inventory/data/items.lua
    ['rental_papers'] = {
        label = 'Rental Papers',
        weight = 50,
    },
Drag or copy the image in fz-rental/web/images/rental_papers.png to ox_inventory/web/images/
Done!
data.support#Support: For any issues or suggestions join: Discord ↗
